news.paragraph: Zscaler is navigating a mix of growth drivers and market volatility, highlighted by a partnership expansion involving IXT Zero Trust SIM to target critical infrastructure. While the stock has been recognized as a high-growth tech name following a recent price rebound, it has also faced recent selling pressure due to broader market movements. Traders should weigh these expansion opportunities against recent price fluctuations and general market trends.
